title: Hiking & Camping
desc: I like hiking and camping. It gives me time to really touch grass and live off the internet for a while.

detail.body:
I like hiking and camping. It gives me the time to really touch grass and try to live off the internet for a while. My favorite feeling is after driving for 6 hours, finally getting to the curvy road with the cold breeze coming through the trees in Yosemite, and stopping for a much needed rest.

[IMAGE: assets/img/parked_car_camping.jpg | The arrival after 6 hours of driving]

One time at the campsite, I saw a deer up close. It was cute and peaceful, even though the night was cold, dark, and a little intense.

[IMAGE: assets/img/deer_camping.jpg | A deer at the campsite]

I love these experiences. They make me feel like an alien visiting Earth for the first time, reminding me to enjoy quiet moments, nature, and the small details around me.
